creator: afedorov@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are several fixes that were not merged to 12-STABLE.

Please look at a bug with a similar trace: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=241133

And the last fix: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/89042ff77668555e77c88549e6ba697088ee72f9#diff-4f9d1140feb6d93b11b7960837403d3fbe036c7609d08d31fe0dbfd1ab6930ff
